name: authentiq.io
prose:
# Authentiq Connect API API

Authentiq Connect OAuth 2.0 and OpenID Connect API reference. Learn about [Authentiq ID](https://www.authentiq.com/) or check out the [Authentiq Connect](https://developers.authentiq.com) developer documentation.

## Getting started

The Authentiq Connect API API is a JSON REST API. All endpoints are relative to the base URL `https://connect.authentiq.io`.

## Authentication

Authorization uses OAuth 2.0. Obtain an access token from the token endpoint, then send it as a Bearer token.

## API reference

### GET /authorize
Authenticate a user
Returns a single record.

### GET /client
List clients
Returns a list of records.

Sample response:

```json
[ { "id": 1 }, { "id": 2 } ]
```

### POST /client
Register a client

### GET /client/{client_id}
View a client
Returns a single record.

### PUT /client/{client_id}
Update a client

### DELETE /client/{client_id}
Delete a client

### POST /token
Obtain an ID Token

### GET /userinfo
Retrieve a user profile
Returns a single record.

### GET /{client_id}/iframe
Include a session iframe
Returns a single record.
